2606.17999.title: VoidPadding: Let [VOID] Handle Padding in Masked Diffusion Language Models so that [EOS] Can Focus on Semantic Termination
2606.17999.paper_summary: MDLMs generate text by denoising a preallocated masked response canvas, making response-length modeling central to instruction tuning. Existing MDLMs often inherit the autoregressive convention of using repeated \texttt{[EOS]} tokens for padding during instruction tuning, giving \texttt{[EOS]} a dual role as both a semantic terminator and a padding token. We show that this dual role is a root cause of \texttt{[EOS]} overflow under large-block decoding. To decouple these roles, we propose VoidPadding, which introduces \texttt{[VOID]} for padding and reserves \texttt{[EOS]} for termination. During inference, the learned \texttt{[EOS]} signal enables early stopping, while the learned \texttt{[VOID]} signal guides adaptive response canvas expansion. On Dream-7B-Instruct, VoidPadding improves the block-size-averaged four-task mean across mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks by \(+17.84\) points over the original model and \(+6.95\) points over RainbowPadding, while reducing decoding NFE by 55.7\% on average. Code is available at https://github.com/Haru-LCY/VoidPadding.
2606.17999.paper_summary_zh: MDLMs 透過去噪一個預先分配的遮罩響應畫布來生成文本，使得響應長度建模成為指令調整的核心。現有的 MDLMs 通常繼承了使用重複的 \texttt{[EOS]} 標記進行指令調整的自回歸慣例，使得 \texttt{[EOS]} 同時擔任語義終止符和填充標記的雙重角色。我們展示了這種雙重角色是大型區塊解碼下 \texttt{[EOS]} 溢出的根本原因。為了將這些角色解耦，我們提出了 VoidPadding，它引入了 \texttt{[VOID]} 作為填充，並保留 \texttt{[EOS]} 用於終止。在推理過程中，學習到的 \texttt{[EOS]} 信號使得早期停止成為可能，而學習到的 \texttt{[VOID]} 信號則指導自適應響應畫布的擴展。在 Dream-7B-Instruct 上，VoidPadding 在數學推理和代碼生成基準測試中，將塊大小平均的四任務均值提升了 \(+17.84\) 分，相較於原始模型提升了 \(+6.95\) 分，並且平均減少了解碼 NFE 55.7\%。代碼可在 https://github.com/Haru-LCY/VoidPadding 獲得。
2606.17999.author: Chunyu Liu et.al.
2606.17999.authors: Chunyu Liu, Zhengyang Fan, Kaisen Yang, Alex Lamb
